name: personal-portfolio
install:
yarn install --frozen-lockfile
cd cloudflare-worker && yarn install --frozen-lockfile

terminals.name: Next.js dev server
terminals.description: Regenerates resume/search artifacts, then serves the portfolio at http://localhost:3000

terminals.name: Cloudflare Worker
terminals.description: Optional Wrangler dev server at http://127.0.0.1:8787 for contact, assistant, and CMS OAuth E2E
